info.title: Security Center
info.description: API spec for Microsoft.Security (Azure Security Center) resource provider

get.description: Use this method get the list of device security groups for the specified IoT Hub resource.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

get.description: Use this method to get the device security group for the specified IoT Hub resource.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

parameters.name: deviceSecurityGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the device security group. Note that the name of the device security group is case insensitive.

put.description: Use this method to creates or updates the device security group on a specified IoT Hub resource.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

parameters.name: deviceSecurityGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the device security group. Note that the name of the device security group is case insensitive.

parameters.name: deviceSecurityGroup
parameters.description: Security group object.

delete.description: User this method to deletes the device security group.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

parameters.name: deviceSecurityGroupName
parameters.description: The name of the device security group. Note that the name of the device security group is case insensitive.

get.description: Use this method to get the list of IoT Security solutions by subscription.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: Filter the IoT Security solution with OData syntax. Supports filtering by iotHubs.

get.description: Use this method to get the list IoT Security solutions organized by resource group.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: Filter the IoT Security solution with OData syntax. Supports filtering by iotHubs.

get.description: User this method to get details of a specific IoT Security solution based on solution name

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

put.description: Use this method to create or update yours IoT Security solution

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: iotSecuritySolutionData
parameters.description: The security solution data

patch.description: Use this method to update existing IoT Security solution tags or user defined resources. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: updateIotSecuritySolutionData
parameters.description: The security solution data

delete.description: Use this method to delete yours IoT Security solution

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

get.description: Use this method to get IoT security Analytics metrics in an array.

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

get.description: Use this method to get IoT Security Analytics metrics.

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

get.description: Use this method to get the aggregated alert list of yours IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of results to retrieve.

get.description: Use this method to get a single the aggregated alert of yours IoT Security solution. This aggregation is performed by alert name.

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: aggregatedAlertName
parameters.description: Identifier of the aggregated alert.

post.description: Use this method to dismiss an aggregated IoT Security Solution Alert.

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: aggregatedAlertName
parameters.description: Identifier of the aggregated alert.

get.description: Use this method to get the list of aggregated security analytics recommendations of yours IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of results to retrieve.

get.description: Use this method to get the aggregated security analytics recommendation of yours IoT Security solution. This aggregation is performed by recommendation name.

parameters.name: solutionName
parameters.description: The name of the IoT Security solution.

parameters.name: aggregatedRecommendationName
parameters.description: Name of the recommendation aggregated for this query.

ActiveConnectionsNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of active connections is not in allowed range.

values.name: Alerts
values.description: Alerts

values.name: RawEvents
values.description: RawEvents

values.name: Sentinel
values.description: Sentinel

dataTypes.description: List of data types sent to workspace

AllowlistCustomAlertRule.description: A custom alert rule that checks if a value (depends on the custom alert type) is allowed.

allowlistValues.description: The values to allow. The format of the values depends on the rule type.

AmqpC2DMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of cloud to device messages (AMQP protocol) is not in allowed range.

AmqpC2DRejectedMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of rejected cloud to device messages (AMQP protocol) is not in allowed range.

AmqpD2CMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of device to cloud messages (AMQP protocol) is not in allowed range.

CloudError.description: Describes an Azure resource.Common error response for all Azure Resource Manager APIs to return error details for failed operations. (This also follows the OData error response format.).

ConnectionFromIpNotAllowed.description: Inbound connection from an ip that isn't allowed. Allow list consists of ipv4 or ipv6 range in CIDR notation.

ConnectionToIpNotAllowed.description: Outbound connection to an ip that isn't allowed. Allow list consists of ipv4 or ipv6 range in CIDR notation.

displayName.description: The display name of the custom alert.

description.description: The description of the custom alert.

ruleType.description: The type of the custom alert rule.

values.name: TwinData
values.description: Devices twin data

DenylistCustomAlertRule.description: A custom alert rule that checks if a value (depends on the custom alert type) is denied.

denylistValues.description: The values to deny. The format of the values depends on the rule type.

value.description: List of device security group objects

nextLink.description: The URI to fetch the next page.

DeviceSecurityGroupProperties.description: describes properties of a security group.

thresholdRules.description: The list of custom alert threshold rules.

timeWindowRules.description: The list of custom alert time-window rules.

DirectMethodInvokesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of direct method invokes is not in allowed range.

ErrorAdditionalInfo.description: The resource management error additional info.

values.name: RawEvents
values.description: Agent raw events

FailedLocalLoginsNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of failed local logins is not in allowed range.

FileUploadsNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of file uploads is not in allowed range.

HttpC2DMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of cloud to device messages (HTTP protocol) is not in allowed range.

HttpC2DRejectedMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of rejected cloud to device messages (HTTP protocol) is not in allowed range.

HttpD2CMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of device to cloud messages (HTTP protocol) is not in allowed range.

properties.description: IoT Security solution aggregated alert details.

IoTSecurityAggregatedAlertList.description: List of IoT Security solution aggregated alert data.

value.description: The IoTSecurityAggregatedAlert items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

IoTSecurityAggregatedAlertProperties.description: IoT Security solution aggregated alert details.

alertDisplayName.description: Display name of the alert type.

vendorName.description: Name of the organization that raised the alert.

description.description: Description of the suspected vulnerability and meaning.

count.description: Number of alerts occurrences within the aggregated time window.

effectedResourceType.description: Azure resource ID of the resource that received the alerts.

systemSource.description: The type of the alerted resource (Azure, Non-Azure).

logAnalyticsQuery.description: Log analytics query for getting the list of affected devices/alerts.

topDevicesList.description: 10 devices with the highest number of occurrences of this alert type, on this day.

alertsCount.description: Number of alerts raised for this device.

lastOccurrence.description: Most recent time this alert was raised for this device, on this day.

IoTSecurityAggregatedRecommendationList.description: List of IoT Security solution aggregated recommendations.

value.description: The IoTSecurityAggregatedRecommendation items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

IoTSecurityAggregatedRecommendationPrope.description: IoT Security solution aggregated recommendation information

recommendationDisplayName.description: Display name of the recommendation type.

description.description: Description of the suspected vulnerability and meaning.

detectedBy.description: Name of the organization that made the recommendation.

healthyDevices.description: Number of healthy devices within the IoT Security solution.

unhealthyDeviceCount.description: Number of unhealthy devices within the IoT Security solution.

logAnalyticsQuery.description: Log analytics query for getting the list of affected devices/alerts.

IoTSecurityAlertedDevice.description: Statistical information about the number of alerts per device during last set number of days.

alertsCount.description: Number of alerts raised for this device.

IoTSecurityDeviceAlert.description: Statistical information about the number of alerts per alert type during last set number of days

alertsCount.description: Number of alerts raised for this alert type.

IoTSecurityDeviceRecommendation.description: Statistical information about the number of recommendations per device, per recommendation type.

devicesCount.description: Number of devices with this recommendation.

IoTSecuritySolutionAnalyticsModel.description: Security analytics of your IoT Security solution

IoTSecuritySolutionAnalyticsModelList.description: List of Security analytics of your IoT Security solution

value.description: The IoTSecuritySolutionAnalyticsModel items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

IoTSecuritySolutionAnalyticsModelPropert.description: Security analytics properties of your IoT Security solution

metrics.description: Security analytics of your IoT Security solution.

unhealthyDeviceCount.description: Number of unhealthy devices within your IoT Security solution.

devicesMetrics.description: List of device metrics by the aggregation date.

topAlertedDevices.description: List of the 3 devices with the most alerts.

mostPrevalentDeviceAlerts.description: List of the 3 most prevalent device alerts.

mostPrevalentDeviceRecommendations.description: List of the 3 most prevalent device recommendations.

date.description: Aggregation of IoT Security solution device alert metrics by date.

IoTSecuritySolutionModel.description: IoT Security solution configuration and resource information.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

status.description: Status of the IoT Security solution.

values.name: Enabled
values.description: Enabled

values.name: Disabled
values.description: Disabled

export.description: List of additional options for exporting to workspace data.

disabledDataSources.description: Disabled data sources. Disabling these data sources compromises the system.

userDefinedResources.description: Properties of the IoT Security solution's user defined resources.

autoDiscoveredResources.description: List of resources that were automatically discovered as relevant to the security solution.

recommendationsConfiguration.description: List of the configuration status for each recommendation type.

values.name: Disabled
values.description: Unmasked IP logging is disabled

values.name: Enabled
values.description: Unmasked IP logging is enabled

value.description: The IoTSecuritySolutionModel items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

IoTSeverityMetrics.description: IoT Security solution analytics severity metrics.

valueType.description: The value type of the items in the list.

LocalUserNotAllowed.description: Login by a local user that isn't allowed. Allow list consists of login names to allow.

MqttC2DMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of cloud to device messages (MQTT protocol) is not in allowed range.

MqttC2DRejectedMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of rejected cloud to device messages (MQTT protocol) is not in allowed range.

MqttD2CMessagesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of device to cloud messages (MQTT protocol) is not in allowed range.

ProcessNotAllowed.description: Execution of a process that isn't allowed. Allow list consists of process names to allow.

QueuePurgesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of device queue purges is not in allowed range.

RecommendationConfigurationProperties.description: The type of IoT Security recommendation.

recommendationType.description: The type of IoT Security recommendation.

status.description: Recommendation status. When the recommendation status is disabled recommendations are not generated.

values.name: Disabled
values.description: Disabled

values.name: Enabled
values.description: Enabled

RecommendationType.description: The type of IoT Security recommendation.

values.name: IoT_ACRAuthentication
values.description: Authentication schema used for pull an edge module from an ACR repository does not use Service Principal Authentication.

values.name: IoT_AgentSendsUnutilizedMessages
values.description: IoT agent message size capacity is currently underutilized, causing an increase in the number of sent messages. Adjust message intervals for better utilization.

values.name: IoT_Baseline
values.description: Identified security related system configuration issues.

values.name: IoT_EdgeHubMemOptimize
values.description: You can optimize Edge Hub memory usage by turning off protocol heads for any protocols not used by Edge modules in your solution.

values.name: IoT_EdgeLoggingOptions
values.description: Logging is disabled for this edge module.

values.name: IoT_InconsistentModuleSettings
values.description: A minority within a device security group has inconsistent Edge Module settings with the rest of their group.

values.name: IoT_InstallAgent
values.description: Install the Azure Security of Things Agent.

values.name: IoT_IPFilter_DenyAll
values.description: IP Filter Configuration should have rules defined for allowed traffic and should deny all other traffic by default.

values.name: IoT_IPFilter_PermissiveRule
values.description: An Allow IP Filter rules source IP range is too large. Overly permissive rules might expose your IoT hub to malicious intenders.

values.name: IoT_OpenPorts
values.description: A listening endpoint was found on the device.

values.name: IoT_PermissiveFirewallPolicy
values.description: An Allowed firewall policy was found (INPUT/OUTPUT). The policy should Deny all traffic by default and define rules to allow necessary communication to/from the device.

values.name: IoT_PermissiveInputFirewallRules
values.description: A rule in the firewall has been found that contains a permissive pattern for a wide range of IP addresses or Ports.

values.name: IoT_PermissiveOutputFirewallRules
values.description: A rule in the firewall has been found that contains a permissive pattern for a wide range of IP addresses or Ports.

values.name: IoT_PrivilegedDockerOptions
values.description: Edge module is configured to run in privileged mode, with extensive Linux capabilities or with host-level network access (send/receive data to host machine).

values.name: IoT_SharedCredentials
values.description: Same authentication credentials to the IoT Hub used by multiple devices. This could indicate an illegitimate device impersonating a legitimate device. It also exposes the risk of device impersonation by an attacker.

values.name: IoT_VulnerableTLSCipherSuite
values.description: Insecure TLS configurations detected. Immediate upgrade recommended.

values.name: Informational
values.description: Informational

values.name: Low
values.description: Low

values.name: Medium
values.description: Medium

values.name: High
values.description: High

TagsResource.description: A container holding only the Tags for a resource, allowing the user to update the tags.

ThresholdCustomAlertRule.description: A custom alert rule that checks if a value (depends on the custom alert type) is within the given range.

TimeWindowCustomAlertRule.description: A custom alert rule that checks if the number of activities (depends on the custom alert type) in a time window is within the given range.

timeWindowSize.description: The time window size in iso8601 format.

TwinUpdatesNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of twin updates is not in allowed range.

UnauthorizedOperationsNotInAllowedRange.description: Number of unauthorized operations is not in allowed range.

userDefinedResources.description: Properties of the IoT Security solution's user defined resources.

recommendationsConfiguration.description: List of the configuration status for each recommendation type.

UserDefinedResourcesProperties.description: Properties of the IoT Security solution's user defined resources.

query.description: Azure Resource Graph query which represents the security solution's user defined resources. Required to start with "where type != "Microsoft.Devices/IotHubs""

querySubscriptions.description: List of Azure subscription ids on which the user defined resources query should be executed.

ValueType.description: The value type of the items in the list.

values.name: IpCidr
values.description: An IP range in CIDR format (e.g. '192.168.0.1/8').

values.name: String
values.description: Any string value.
